name: research_analysis
success_criteria: Research questions are answered with synthesised evidence from multiple sources, and a clear report is produced.

tasks.title: Define research questions
tasks.description: State the primary and secondary research questions. Define scope and success criteria for the inquiry.

tasks.title: Gather sources
tasks.description: Identify and collect relevant data sources, documents, and stakeholder inputs. Assess source quality.

tasks.title: Extract insights
tasks.description: Read and analyse each source. Extract key findings, data points, and quotes that bear on the research questions.

tasks.title: Cross-reference findings
tasks.description: Identify agreements, contradictions, and gaps across sources. Flag conflicting evidence for resolution.

tasks.title: Synthesise
tasks.description: Combine verified findings into a coherent narrative that directly answers the research questions.

tasks.title: Write report
tasks.description: Produce a structured report: executive summary, findings, evidence, recommendations, and limitations.
